purpose: Assess whether newly surfaced external datasets can directly break WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC.
eligibility_rule: wearable IMU or directly alignable modality
labels for T1 items 9-14 or total MDS-UPDRS Part III
metadata sufficient for strict subject-level splits

routes.name: CARE-PD
routes.access_status: public
routes.label: UPDRS_GAIT
routes.modality: SMPL 3D gait meshes from RGB or motion capture
routes.verdict: SOTA comparator / gait-score benchmark only; not a T1/T3 CCC ceiling-break route.

routes.name: MJFF Levodopa Response / Hssayeni
routes.access_status: Synapse DUA/READ-gated
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS and symptom labels
routes.modality: wearable accelerometers, including wrist/waist/forearm/shank/back
routes.verdict: Larger direct external wearable UPDRS-III route, but blocked until DUA approval.
routes.alias_note: Scientific Data 2021 minimum-set and limb/trunk accelerometry papers are the same Synapse syn20681023 MJFF/Hssayeni route, not separate unblocked datasets.

routes.name: PPMI / Verily Study Watch
routes.access_status: PPMI DUA/application required; no local credentials configured
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part III and Hoehn & Yahr in PPMI clinical data; npj 2025 analysis linked MDS-UPDRS within 90 days of wearable data
routes.modality: Verily Study Watch wrist accelerometer, 100 Hz, free-living longitudinal monitoring
routes.verdict: Priority gated direct external T3 route. Kimi advised documenting it and waiting for user PPMI DUA/account action before building a probe scaffold; do not launch a remote job without credentials.

routes.name: Personalized Parkinson Project / PD Virtual Motor Exam
routes.access_status: RDSRC request-gated; no local access or schema; data release fees may apply
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part III at clinic visits and consensus subitem ratings for PD-VME validation subsets
routes.modality: Verily Study Watch wrist sensors during passive monitoring and self-guided active motor tasks
routes.verdict: Strong gated Verily-watch external route and useful peer to PPMI/Verily, but not public or locally approved. Do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until RDSRC access is approved and row-level sensor/label schema is available.

routes.name: WATCH-PD
routes.access_status: C-Path 3DT Stage 2 membership or WATCH-PD Steering Committee proposal required; no local access or schema; C-Path Integrated Parkinson's Database does not include DHT data
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Parts I-III; APDM sensors worn during MDS-UPDRS Part III; mean PD Part III 24.1 at baseline
routes.modality: Apple Watch, iPhone BrainBaseline, and APDM Opal inertial sensors during in-clinic MDS-UPDRS Part III plus at-home longitudinal digital assessments
routes.verdict: Direct and protocol-relevant external T3 route, but request-gated and schema-hidden. Add to access queue only; do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until C-Path 3DT membership or WATCH-PD Steering Committee approval provides row-level sensor files, labels, and schema. PPMI remains higher priority because it is larger and already has a Verily/MDS-UPDRS publication trail.

routes.name: Advanced PD smartwatch home monitoring / Fay-Karmon 2024
routes.access_status: data available from corresponding author upon reasonable request; no local files or row-level schema
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part II and Part III in ON/OFF states plus Part IV, daily motor-task labels and diaries
routes.modality: Intel Pharma Analytics Platform smartwatch plus iPhone/app during approximately two weeks of home-based monitoring with proprietary SWA algorithm outputs
routes.verdict: Request-only small advanced-PD smartwatch route. It is not actionable for the active T1/T3 CCC objective because the row-level files/schema are not public, SWA scoring is proprietary, N=21 is below stronger already-tested external rows, and no T1 item-level target is visible. Do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run unless data-owner approval and schema are obtained.

routes.name: Marital-dyad social actigraphy / Sensors 2023
routes.access_status: source data available to researchers upon author request; no local files or row-level schema
routes.label: clinician MDS-UPDRS Part III total for the PD participant
routes.modality: non-dominant wrist GeneActiv triaxial accelerometry at 100 Hz for seven days in PD participants and spouses
routes.verdict: Request-only small daily-life/social-actigraphy route. It is not actionable for the active T1/T3 CCC objective because the row-level files/schema are not public, the protocol is dyad/social activity rather than structured WearGait-like gait/balance, N=27 PD participants is underpowered after stronger external rows, and no T1 item-level target is visible. Do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run unless data-owner approval and schema are obtained.

routes.name: ICICLE-PD / ICICLE-GAIT
routes.access_status: request-gated via Newcastle / data available on request; no local agreement or files
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part III and Hoehn & Yahr at clinical visits
routes.modality: lower-back Axivity AX3 triaxial accelerometer, 100 Hz, +/-8g, 7-day free-living real-world gait at 18-month visits over 6 years
routes.verdict: Direct longitudinal external T3 route with clinician MDS-UPDRS Part III labels, but request-gated and lower-back rather than wrist-native. Document and pursue access only; do not create a scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run until files and schema are available.

routes.name: Mobilise-D TVS / CVS
routes.access_status: TVS public on Zenodo; CVS row-level public wearable/clinical release or schema not found
routes.label: TVS includes demographic/clinical variables but is explicitly for algorithm validation, not clinical inference; CVS reports MDS-UPDRS in a 600+ PD longitudinal cohort
routes.modality: TVS lower-back McRoberts MM+ IMU plus reference systems, with some wrist-worn recordings; CVS lower-back wearable worn for seven days after study visits
routes.verdict: Do not preregister/download for the active WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC objective. The open TVS is an algorithm-validation dataset and not a clinical UPDRS-III regression target. CVS is potentially useful future lower-back longitudinal T3 evidence, but remains a release/access/schema watch route; no scaffold, preregistration, download, or remote job is justified until row-level wearable plus MDS-UPDRS III data access is confirmed.

routes.name: FoG-STAR
routes.access_status: public
routes.label: updrs_iii total MDS-UPDRS Part III
routes.modality: IMUs on left ankle, right ankle, lower back, and wrist
routes.verdict: Direct public small-N T3 external route; iter38 Stage-1 augmentation screen failed and iter39 zero-shot showed partial clinical+wrist external validity only.

zero_shot_result.interpretation: partial external-validity evidence only; no internal canonical change

routes.name: COPS
routes.access_status: public
routes.label: UPDRS-III OFF/ON total and item-level CSVs
routes.modality: bilateral wrist GENEActiv accelerometry at 100 Hz, free-living
routes.verdict: Direct public T3 external route; iter49 zero-shot is complete. Wrist-only WearGait-to-COPS transfer is null, clinical+wrist transfer is partial, COPS-only LOOCV sanity is modest, and no internal canonical T3 change is allowed from this external result.

zero_shot_result.interpretation: external-validity evidence only; no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change

routes.name: TLVMC / DeFOG Parkinson's Freezing of Gait Prediction
routes.access_status: public via Kaggle competition files and Zenodo archived competition dataset; iter51 full public raw-data run completed on remote
routes.label: subjects.csv contains UPDRSIII_On, UPDRSIII_Off, and NFOGQ; DeFOG metadata joins recordings to Subject/Visit/Medication
routes.modality: lower-back/trunk accelerometry with AccV/AccML/AccAP axes for DeFOG structured FoG tasks plus daily free-living recordings; tdcsfog metadata exists but did not join to UPDRS-III targets in this probe
routes.verdict: Direct public T3 external route; iter51 zero-shot is complete. WearGait lower-back magnitude features transfer weakly but positively to OFF-state DeFOG, wrist-to-lumbar stress transfer is near-null, DeFOG-only LOSO sanity is modest, and no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change is allowed from this external result.

preregistration.interpretation: external transportability evidence only; no internal canonical change

skipped_raw_files.reason: Usecols do not match columns, columns expected but not found: ['Valid', 'Task']

zero_shot_result.interpretation: partial external-validity evidence only; no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change

routes.name: PDFE turning-in-place
routes.access_status: public Figshare CC-BY 4.0
routes.label: session-level UPDRS-III total in PDFEinfo.csv; session 1 used for iter52 primary external scoring
routes.modality: shank IMU acceleration and gyroscope during turning-in-place; video files also public but not used
routes.verdict: Direct public T3 external route; iter52 zero-shot is complete. WearGait lateral-shank transfer is negative, clinical+shank transfer is weak and CI-crossing-zero, PDFE-only LOOCV sanity is positive, and no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change is allowed from this external result.

preregistration.experiment: T3 iter52 PDFE turning-in-place external zero-shot validation
preregistration.primary_rows: one row per PDFE subject: trial/session 1 only, target = Session 1 UPDRS-III
preregistration.interpretation: external transportability evidence only; no internal canonical change

zero_shot_result.interpretation: external-validity evidence only; no internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical change

consults.kimi: document_only_conservative_due_shank_protocol_mismatch; empirical iter52 run recorded as external-only negative/weak transfer

routes.name: Public overground walking full-body biomechanics
routes.access_status: public Figshare CC-BY 4.0
routes.label: ON/OFF UPDRS-III total and item columns in PDGinfo.xlsx
routes.modality: 3D motion capture and force plates during overground walking; no wearable IMU feature space
routes.verdict: Public target-bearing gait-biomechanics dataset, but not a WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC route because the modality is laboratory motion capture and force plates rather than wearable IMU.

routes.name: PADS
routes.access_status: public and already evaluated
routes.label: diagnosis/cohort class, not UPDRS-III
routes.modality: wrist smartwatch IMU
routes.verdict: Already useful for zero-shot transportability, not for T1/T3 regression CCC.

routes.name: ALAMEDA Parkinson's Disease Accelerometer Dataset
routes.access_status: public
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS III annotations, but N=11 PD
routes.modality: wrist-worn GENEActiv raw accelerometer Parquet over longitudinal monitoring periods
routes.verdict: Public direct T3-labeled route, but N=11 and free-living/longitudinal protocol make it underpowered and low-value after COPS/FoG-STAR/PADS. Kimi advised no iter50 preregistration or download for this objective.

routes.name: Comprehensive Multi-Modal Dataset for Parkinson's Disease Prediction
routes.access_status: public on Zenodo
routes.label: UPDRS part totals and scalar gait summaries in a derived table; no item-level Part III raw subitems
routes.modality: CSF protein/peptide features plus scalar gait summaries (gait_time, gait_steps, freezing), not raw wearable IMU
routes.verdict: Public derived benchmark table, not a contemporaneous wearable sensor cohort. It mixes Kaggle AMP clinical/CSF data with a Mendeley gait repository, exposes only scalar gait summaries rather than raw IMU, and lacks T1 item-level labels or a trustworthy subject-aligned wearable-to-UPDRS schema. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified.

routes.name: Monipar
routes.access_status: public on Zenodo, CC-BY 4.0
routes.label: exercise-level MDS-UPDRS subitem labels for the supervised group only; no confirmed total Part III
routes.modality: single consumer-smartwatch triaxial accelerometer at 50 Hz during eight structured exercises
routes.verdict: Public consumer-smartwatch subitem dataset. It lacks total MDS-UPDRS Part III, lacks a full T1 9-14 composite, and has only six supervised PD subjects with item labels. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified for the active WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: BIOCLITE
routes.access_status: public on Zenodo, CC-BY 4.0
routes.label: per-exercise MDS-UPDRS score 0-4 when a clinical evaluation is available; no total Part III endpoint
routes.modality: single consumer-smartwatch triaxial accelerometer and gyroscope at 50 Hz across supervised and unsupervised exercise sessions
routes.verdict: Public smartwatch follow-up to Monipar with acc+gyro and supervised/unsupervised sessions. It is useful related work for exercise-level motor subitems, but it cannot support total T3 or the full T1 items 9-14 composite. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified for the active WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: mPower
routes.access_status: Synapse DUA plus MDS-UPDRS copyright/permission friction
routes.label: self-reported subset of MDS-UPDRS patient-questionnaire items, not clinician-rated Part III total
routes.modality: iPhone handheld/pocket accelerometer/gyroscope during walking, standing, tapping, voice, and cognitive tasks
routes.verdict: Large digital PD cohort, but not a direct WearGait-PD T1/T3 CCC route: labels are self-reported subset items, not clinician MDS-UPDRS III total, and phone task sensors do not align with the wrist-IMU gait/balance feature space.

routes.name: Papadopoulos phone-call tremor
routes.access_status: public on Zenodo, CC-BY 4.0
routes.label: tremor-specific annotations only: UPDRS II item 16 plus Part III item 20/21 left/right hand tremor in the clinically examined group
routes.modality: smartphone embedded IMU acceleration recorded during phone calls, in-the-wild
routes.verdict: Public tremor-subitem/free-living context only. It lacks total MDS-UPDRS Part III and T1 items 9-14, uses smartphone phone-call accelerometry rather than WearGait gait/balance IMU tasks, and should not receive a preregistration, download, or remote job for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: Harmonized Upper/Lower Limb Accelerometry
routes.access_status: NICHD DASH controlled access Part1/Part2; processing code public on GitHub/Zenodo
routes.label: demographic/clinical survey fields; no confirmed total MDS-UPDRS Part III or T1 items 9-14
routes.modality: daily-life ActiGraph upper/lower-limb accelerometry and processed summary variables
routes.verdict: Document-only route. The dataset is a valuable rehab/free-living accelerometry resource, but it lacks confirmed total MDS-UPDRS Part III or T1 items 9-14, is controlled-access through DASH, and exposes daily-life ActiGraph summaries rather than WearGait-aligned gait/balance raw IMU. No preregistration, download, scaffold, or remote job is justified for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: REMAP Bristol
routes.access_status: University of Bristol controlled dataset application required for accelerometry and individual clinical ranges
routes.label: motor MDS-UPDRS / Part III values released as individual-level ranges plus STS/turning labels
routes.modality: open coarsened skeleton data; controlled bilateral wrist accelerometry for STS, turning, and other mobility episodes
routes.verdict: Not worth preregistration for this objective: accelerometry is controlled, exact continuous T3 labels are not an unblocked public CCC target, and N=12 PD is the same underpowered class as ALAMEDA after stronger COPS/FoG-STAR rows already exist.

routes.name: Oxford OPDC / OxQUIP wearable progression lead
routes.access_status: OPDC clinical cohort requires DPUK application; OxQUIP wearable study data not publicly shared
routes.label: clinician MDS-UPDRS III in OxQUIP paper; OPDC catalogue has clinical variables but no confirmed public aligned IMU files
routes.modality: OxQUIP used 6 APDM IMUs for walking and postural sway; OPDC Discovery is primarily clinical/genetic/imaging cohort metadata
routes.verdict: Do not preregister/download. The Oxford wearable progression paper reports useful MDS-UPDRS III + IMU data but explicitly says original data were not shareable at publication; OPDC/DPUK access is a catalogue/application route without confirmed public wrist-IMU files.

routes.name: PD-BioStampRC21
routes.access_status: open via IEEE DataPort DOI; Kaggle mirrors exist but are not treated as canonical
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS assessment-task annotations and demographic/clinical assessment data; published analysis emphasizes Part III and rest-tremor items
routes.modality: five BioStampRC accelerometers on chest, thighs, and forearms at 31.25 Hz; no wrist sensor
routes.verdict: Open and clinically interesting, but too small and geometrically mismatched for the current WearGait-PD wrist-IMU CCC objective. At most it is a forearm/tremor robustness dataset, not an internal T1/T3 ceiling-breaker.

routes.name: CNS Portugal / Lobo IS2022 AX3 gait
routes.access_status: request-gated through authors/CNS; related CNS Sensors 2022 article states raw data available from authors on request
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS Part III total and Hoehn & Yahr 2-4
routes.modality: Axivity AX3 triaxial accelerometers on wrist and lower back, 100 Hz, structured 10-meter walk

published_benchmark.best_10pct_model: Random Forest, 2.5 s window, wrist + lower back
published_benchmark.best_loso_model: SVM, 5 s window, wrist + lower back
published_benchmark.validation_caution: 10% heldout result is window-level/patient-already-seen optimistic; require subject/session-grouped validation

routes.verdict: Direct request-gated T3 external route with wrist+lower-back AX3 and structured 10 m walk. Do not scaffold before schema and access are confirmed. Treat as external-validity evidence only; not an internal WearGait-PD ceiling-breaker.

routes.name: Luxembourg upper-limb MDS-UPDRS III subitem study
routes.access_status: paper public; datasets not publicly available and only available upon reasonable request under national/institutional regulations
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS III upper-limb subitems; no total Part III endpoint for current objective
routes.modality: two compact hand IMUs during elicited upper-limb tasks
routes.verdict: Document-only upper-limb observability context. The route maps to residual-burden items 4/5/6, but it is request-only, ON-medication, subitem-only, and not a total T3 or full T1 endpoint. Do not create an access runbook, preregistration, scaffold, download job, or remote run for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: Pre-QuantiPark / ActiMyo levodopa-challenge wearable IMU pilot
routes.access_status: paper public; data request-gated for academic non-commercial use after written proposal review and data access agreement
routes.label: Repeated MDS-UPDRS Part III total during a 90-minute levodopa challenge; no visible T1 items 9-14 endpoint
routes.modality: ActiMyo magneto-inertial sensors on the most affected wrist and ankle, 130.69 Hz, controlled levodopa-challenge setting
routes.verdict: Document-only levodopa-challenge wearable-IMU context. The route has repeated MDS-UPDRS Part III during a within-subject L-dopa challenge, but it is request-only, N=10, highly selected, schema-hidden, and not a stable cross-sectional WearGait-PD T1/T3 ceiling-break route. Do not create an access runbook, preregistration, scaffold, download job, request packet, or remote run for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: TUM Donie 2025 ROCKET/InceptionTime wrist symptom-classification alias
routes.access_status: paper and code public; underlying data are MJFF Levodopa Response syn20681023 and remain Synapse DUA-gated
routes.label: Task-level tremor severity plus bradykinesia/dyskinesia presence labels; not total MDS-UPDRS Part III and not T1 items 9-14
routes.modality: GENEActiv smartwatch/wrist accelerometer on most affected limb, 50 Hz, predefined motor tasks
routes.verdict: Document-only alias to the existing Hssayeni/MJFF DUA gate and already-negative ROCKET/InceptionTime-style algorithm families. The public code is useful related work, but the data source is still syn20681023, the labels are task-level symptom classifications rather than T1/T3 regression targets, and local ROCKET/MultiROCKET plus learned time-series fine-tuning routes have already failed. Do not create an access runbook, clone/scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: ParaDigMa PD digital biomarker toolbox
routes.access_status: public GitHub/JOSS 2026/Zenodo software; no dataset rows
routes.label: No cohort or clinical labels; feature-extraction software only
routes.modality: wrist accelerometer, gyroscope, and PPG feature-extraction pipelines during daily-life passive monitoring
routes.verdict: Document-only standardized wrist-IMU biomarker toolbox. The route is software, not a labeled cohort; applying it to WearGait would be a local scalar handcrafted feature addition, and that category is already closed at N=94. Do not create a preregistration, scaffold, download job, or remote run for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: Yin et al Frontiers Neurology 2025 gait-parameter regression
routes.access_status: paper public; raw data corresponding-author request only; no public row-level schema
routes.label: Total MDS-UPDRS III, tremor part score, and non-tremor part score in OFF/ON medication states
routes.modality: plantar angles, stride length, foot clearance, velocity, cadence, and stride time; likely motion-capture or instrumented-walkway gait parameters rather than raw wearable IMU
routes.verdict: Document-only small-N gait-parameter correlation study. The route is request-only, has no public row-level schema, is underpowered versus already-tested public external rows, and does not expose a WearGait-aligned raw IMU feature path. Do not create an access runbook, preregistration, scaffold, download job, or remote run for the active T1/T3 CCC objective.

routes.name: Parkinson@Home arm-swing validation
routes.access_status: public Radboud WebDAV / DOI route; metadata, clinical CSV, and prepared per-subject parquet files are directly downloadable
routes.label: OFF/ON MDS-UPDRS Part III subitems in patient_info.csv; OFF total Part III is computable under valid-range handling
routes.modality: bilateral wrist accelerometer and gyroscope at 200 Hz, prepared per-subject parquet files with gait and arm-activity labels
routes.verdict: Public direct T3 external route, but iter53 stopped before scoring because the pre-registered feature-readability hard stop retained only 18 valid OFF PD subjects versus the minimum of 20. No zero-shot, within-dataset LOOCV, or OFF/ON response metric exists; no internal WearGait-PD T1/T3 canonical can change. Do not rerun under the same preregistration; any shorter-window or fallback policy requires a fresh preregistration and remains external-validity-only.

consults.kimi: probe_gated_preregistration; run only if public labels/features pass hard stops; no internal canonical update under any outcome

routes.name: Perioperative MDS-UPDRS-III tremor accelerometry / Smid 2026
routes.access_status: paper_only_no_public_row_level_data_found
routes.label: MDS-UPDRS-III tremor items 3.15-3.18 only
routes.modality: wired tri-axial index-finger accelerometers at 200 Hz during 10-second tremor tasks
routes.verdict: document_only_no_scaffold_no_preregistration_no_remote_job: The endpoint is tremor subitems 3.15-3.18, not T1 items 9-14 or total MDS-UPDRS Part III. Sensors are index-finger accelerometers in a perioperative seated tremor protocol, not WearGait-aligned wrist/lower-back gait or balance data. Thresholds use healthy-control accelerometry; that is useful method context but not a fold-clean WearGait deployment route. No public row-level data or reusable schema was visible from the opened article page.

routes.name: PDAssist de novo smartphone UPDRS Part III / Guo 2025
routes.access_status: article_data_available_statement_but_no_public_row_level_schema_seen
routes.label: UPDRS Part III total and task/subitem scores in untreated de novo PD
routes.modality: smartphone accelerometer/gyroscope/touchscreen/camera/microphone tasks
routes.verdict: document_only_no_scaffold_no_preregistration_no_remote_job: The cohort is larger and clinically interesting, but the modality is smartphone active tasks plus camera/audio rather than wearable IMU comparable to WearGait. The article page says data are available, but no direct row-level public download/schema was visible in the opened evidence. The methods used severity-stratified truncation based on feature correlations with UPDRS-III; that is a methodology warning for leakage-sensitive benchmarking, not a route to reuse. Any future use would need data-owner access plus a fresh protocol and would be external-validity only, not an internal WearGait-PD canonical update.

decision: Do not launch a CARE-PD download/training job for the current T1/T3 CCC objective. FoG-STAR is a direct public small-N T3 external route, but iter38 Stage-1 augmentation failed and iter39 zero-shot is only partial external-validity evidence; no canonical T3 change. COPS is a public, unblocked, direct T3 external route and iter49 full zero-shot is complete; it adds a larger transportability row but does not update the internal WearGait-PD T3 headline. ALAMEDA is public/direct but skipped as underpowered at N=11 after web/API triage and Kimi consult. The Zenodo Comprehensive Multi-Modal Dataset is public but skipped because it is a derived CSF/clinical/gait-summary table, not raw wearable IMU or a trustworthy contemporaneous sensor-clinical cohort. Mobilise-D TVS is public but explicitly algorithm-validation oriented, so it is skipped for UPDRS-III regression; Mobilise-D CVS is a potentially useful lower-back longitudinal T3 watch/request route, but no row-level public wearable plus MDS-UPDRS III schema/release was found, so no scaffold or remote job is justified. The remaining mPower, Papadopoulos phone-call tremor, Harmonized Upper/Lower Limb Accelerometry, Monipar/BIOCLITE, derivative multimodal Zenodo, Advanced PD smartwatch home monitoring, marital-dyad social actigraphy, REMAP, Oxford OPDC/OxQUIP, PD-BioStampRC21, Luxembourg/NCER-PD upper-limb subitem, Pre-QuantiPark ActiMyo levodopa-challenge, TUM Donie ROCKET/InceptionTime, ParaDigMa, and Yin et al gait-parameter leads do not warrant preregistration or download for T1/T3 CCC: mPower has self-reported subset labels plus phone sensors, Papadopoulos has phone-call accelerometry with tremor-subitem labels only, the harmonized accelerometry dataset has DASH-gated daily-life ActiGraph rehab summaries and no confirmed Part III/T1 targets, Monipar/BIOCLITE are public subitem-only smartwatch datasets, the derivative multimodal table lacks raw wearable IMU and auditable subject alignment, the advanced-PD smartwatch route is N=21, request-only, and proprietary/schema-hidden, the marital-dyad route is N=27, request-only, and daily-life/social-actigraphy oriented rather than structured gait/balance, REMAP is controlled and N=12 with range labels, Oxford wearable data are not publicly shared / OPDC lacks confirmed public IMU files, BioStamp is N=17 with forearm/chest/thigh sensors, Luxembourg/NCER-PD is request-only, ON-medication, upper-limb subitem-only observability context rather than total T3 or full T1, Pre-QuantiPark is request-only, N=10, and a within-subject levodopa-challenge trajectory rather than a stable cross-sectional WearGait-PD severity endpoint, TUM Donie 2025 is a public-code alias to DUA-gated syn20681023 with task-level symptom-classification labels plus already-negative ROCKET/InceptionTime-style algorithm families, ParaDigMa is software rather than a labeled cohort and would be a dead local scalar feature-addition route, and Yin et al is request-only, N=20, schema-hidden, and likely gait-parameter/motion-capture rather than raw WearGait-aligned IMU. Hssayeni/MJFF, PPMI/Verily, WATCH-PD, ICICLE-PD/ICICLE-GAIT, CNS Portugal/Lobo AX3 gait, and Mobilise-D CVS are direct or plausible external wearable-UPDRS routes, but all are access/request/release-gated. PPMI remains the higher-priority DUA target if the user applies to only one route because it is wrist-native, larger, longitudinal, and has a 2025 Verily/MDS-UPDRS publication trail. WATCH-PD is protocol-relevant and wrist/APDM-native, but it is smaller, early-untreated, consortium/proposal-gated, and schema-hidden; no scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run is justified until C-Path 3DT or Steering Committee access exists. The Fay-Karmon advanced-PD smartwatch, marital-dyad GeneActiv, Pre-QuantiPark ActiMyo, TUM Donie/MJFF subset, ParaDigMa, and Yin et al rows are lower-priority access/request-only, software-only, or alias/context because they are small-N, schema-hidden, target-mismatched, or already subsumed; no scaffold, preregistration, download job, request packet, or remote run is justified until data-owner approval and row-level schema exist. CNS Portugal/Lobo is a strong structured-gait second/peer request route because it has wrist plus lower-back AX3, 74 PD subjects, and direct MDS-UPDRS Part III labels, but no scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run is justified until files and schema are available. ICICLE and Mobilise-D CVS are useful lower-back longitudinal gait routes once access/release exists, but no scaffold, preregistration, download job, or remote run is justified until files and schema are available. TLVMC/DeFOG is a public direct T3 external-validation route and iter51 is now complete: Track A lower-back magnitude zero-shot OFF CCC is +0.2695 (95% CI [+0.1693,+0.3600]), Track B wrist-to-lumbar stress CCC is +0.0485, and Track C DeFOG-only LOSO sanity CCC is +0.3450. It is partial external-validity evidence only and cannot update the internal WearGait-PD T3 canonical. Parkinson@Home is the one newly probed public/direct T3 route from the 2026-05-09 refresh; iter53 passed metadata and preregistration gates but hard-stopped before scoring at 18 feature-readable OFF PD subjects versus the frozen N>=20 rule, so it contributes no metric and no canonical/internal ceiling update.
